entity.summary: United States crypto exchange that wound down U.S. operations in 2023, was charged by the SEC, and filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy. HEI treats Bittrex separately from Bittrex Global, which was a related international entity with its own shutdown history.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded row hei_unadded_0337. Public-site check showed Bittrex Global as a separate dead-side record; this record intentionally does not alias or merge Bittrex Global.

events.title: Bittrex announced end of U.S. operations
events.description: Bittrex announced it would wind down U.S. operations, with trading ending in April 2023 and customers told to withdraw funds by the end of that month.
events.notes: Death date is set to 2023-04-30 based on the U.S. customer withdrawal deadline cited in contemporaneous coverage.

events.title: SEC charged Bittrex over unregistered exchange allegations
events.description: The SEC charged Bittrex, Inc. and its former CEO for operating an unregistered national securities exchange, broker, and clearing agency. The SEC also charged Bittrex Global GmbH in connection with shared order-book allegations, but this record remains the Bittrex U.S. entity record.
events.notes: This event records the U.S. SEC enforcement action and does not merge the separate Bittrex Global entity.

events.title: Bittrex filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy after U.S. shutdown
events.description: Bittrex filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection after announcing the wind-down of its U.S. operations.
events.notes: Bankruptcy was tied to the U.S. Bittrex entity; international Bittrex Global history remains a separate record context.

evidence.title: Crypto Exchange Bittrex to End U.S. Operations
evidence.notes: Secondary source for the U.S. operations wind-down and April 2023 customer deadlines.

evidence.title: Bittrex official website archive
evidence.notes: Original Bittrex domain preserved as archived entity evidence.

evidence.title: SEC Charges Crypto Asset Trading Platform Bittrex and its Former CEO for Operating an Unregistered Exchange, Broker, and Clearing Agency
evidence.notes: Primary regulator source for the April 2023 SEC action.

evidence.title: Bittrex Files for Bankruptcy After Ending US Operations
evidence.notes: Secondary source for the Chapter 11 filing after the U.S. operations shutdown.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for Bittrex
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0337.
